projects.title: An ambient interface for AI hardware
projects.summary: A calm, screen-optional companion device that surfaces the right thing at the right moment instead of demanding attention.
projects.body:
## The problem

Most AI hardware borrows the phone's playbook: a screen, a feed, a stream of notifications. That's exactly the interaction model people say they want less of.

The goal here was to design a device that earns its place on the desk by staying quiet until it has something genuinely useful to say.

## Approach

- Mapped the moments where a glanceable cue beats a full screen
- Prototyped an ambient light + audio language for status
- Tested three escalation levels, from a soft glow to a spoken summary

## What I learned

Restraint is a feature. The version people trusted most was the one that interrupted least.

projects.title: Rethinking onboarding for a fintech app
projects.summary: Cut a 9-step signup down to 4 without losing a single compliance requirement, lifting activation meaningfully.
projects.body:
## Context

The original flow asked for everything up front. People dropped off before they ever saw the product.

## What changed

- Deferred non-essential steps until after first value
- Rebuilt the form components for inline validation
- Instrumented each step so drop-off was finally visible

Swap this text for your real case study whenever you're ready.
